title: Potion of Supreme Healing
excerpt: You regain 10d4 + 20 hit_points|Hit Points when you drink this potion. The potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated....
markdown:
# Potion of Supreme Healing

You regain 10d4 + 20 [[hit_points]] when you drink this potion. The potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.
